          <head>
            <title>sqlalchemy.exc.IntegrityError: (psycopg2.errors.UniqueViolation) duplicate key value violates unique constraint &#34;users_phone_key&#34;
        DETAIL:  Key (phone)=(0901234567) already exists.
        
        [SQL: UPDATE users SET phone=%(phone)s WHERE users.id = %(users_id)s]
        [parameters: {&#39;phone&#39;: &#39;0901234567&#39;, &#39;users_id&#39;: 2}]

        <pre class="line after"><span class="ws">    </span>def full_dispatch_request(self) -&gt; Response:</pre>

        <li><div class="frame" id="frame-139651746560416">
          <h4>File <cite class="filename">"/app/routes.py"</cite>,
              line <em class="line">414</em>,
              in <code class="function">update_profile</code></h4>
          <div class="source "><pre class="line before"><span class="ws">        </span>else:</pre>
        <pre class="line before"><span class="ws">            </span>p.birthdate = None</pre>
        <pre class="line before"><span class="ws">    </span>if &#34;phone&#34; in d:</pre>
        <pre class="line before"><span class="ws">        </span>u.phone = d.get(&#34;phone&#34;) or None</pre>
        <pre class="line before"><span class="ws"></span> </pre>
        <pre class="line current"><span class="ws">    </span>db.session.commit()
        <span class="ws">    </span>^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^</pre>
        <pre class="line after"><span class="ws">    </span>return {&#34;ok&#34;: True, &#34;profile&#34;: p.to_dict(), &#34;user&#34;: u.to_dict_basic()}</pre>
        <pre class="line after"><span class="ws"></span> </pre>
        <pre class="line after"><span class="ws"></span>@bp.post(&#34;/profile&#34;)</pre>
        <pre class="line after"><span class="ws"></span>def update_profile_form():</pre>

        <h1>IntegrityError</h1>
        <div class="detail">
          <p class="errormsg">sqlalchemy.exc.IntegrityError: (psycopg2.errors.UniqueViolation) duplicate key value violates unique constraint &#34;users_phone_key&#34;
        DETAIL:  Key (phone)=(0901234567) already exists.
        
        [SQL: UPDATE users SET phone=%(phone)s WHERE users.id = %(users_id)s]
        [parameters: {&#39;phone&#39;: &#39;0901234567&#39;, &#39;users_id&#39;: 2}]
        (Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/gkpj)
        </p>
        </div>

        <pre class="line before"><span class="ws">        </span>):</pre>

        <pre class="line before"><span class="ws">        </span># otherwise dispatch to the handler for that endpoint</pre>

        <pre class="line current"><span class="ws">        </span>return self.ensure_sync(self.view_functions[rule.endpoint])(**view_args)  # type: ignore[no-any-return]
        <span class="ws">        </span>       ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^</pre>
        <pre class="line after"><span class="ws"></span> </pre>
        <pre class="line after"><span class="ws">    </span>def full_dispatch_request(self) -&gt; Response:</pre>

        <pre class="line after"><span class="ws"></span> </pre>
        <pre class="line after"><span class="ws">    </span>def full_dispatch_request(self) -&gt; Response:</pre>
        <pre class="line after"><span class="ws">        </span>&#34;&#34;&#34;Dispatches the request and on top of that performs request</pre>

        <li><div class="frame" id="frame-139651741757168">

              in <code class="function">update_profile</code></h4>
          <div class="source "><pre class="line before"><span class="ws">        </span>else:</pre>
        <pre class="line before"><span class="ws">            </span>p.birthdate = None</pre>
        <pre class="line before"><span class="ws">    </span>if &#34;phone&#34; in d:</pre>
        <pre class="line before"><span class="ws">        </span>u.phone = d.get(&#34;phone&#34;) or None</pre>
        <pre class="line before"><span class="ws"></span> </pre>

                  <p>PIN:
                    <input type=text name=pin size=14>
                    <input type=submit name=btn value="Confirm Pin">
                </form>
              </div>
            </div>
          </body>
        </html>

        <pre class="line after"><span class="ws">    </span>def prepare(self) -&gt; None:</pre>
